page.primary_keyword: marbella yacht charter christmas new year
page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter for Christmas and New Year: Festive Cruises

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella yacht charter for Christmas and New Year. Celebrate the festive season with a luxury cruise from Puerto Banús. Prices from €749/2h.
data.summary: Celebrate Christmas and New Year with a Marbella yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Our festive cruises offer luxury, champagne, and stunning Costa del Sol views, with boats for 5 to 12 guests.
key_facts: Festive cruises depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Prices start at €749 for 2 hours (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39).
All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% VAT.
Mangusta 80 (24m) available from €4,719 for 4 hours, includes a jet ski.
Celebrate with champagne, cava, and soft drinks on board.
Boats accommodate 5 to 12 guests, perfect for family or friends.
Book via WhatsApp for pricing on larger yachts like Ferretti 94 or Canados 86.

faq.q: Can I charter a yacht on Christmas Day or New Year's Eve in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, our fleet is available for charter on Christmas Day, New Year's Eve, and New Year's Day. We recommend booking at least 2 weeks in advance to secure your preferred yacht and time slot, as festive dates are popular.

faq.q: What is included in a festive yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). For New Year's Eve, you can bring your own champagne or request a premium package via WhatsApp.

faq.q: How many guests can join a Christmas or New Year cruise?
faq.a: Our yachts accommodate from 5 guests on the Dubhe (8m) up to 12 guests on the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, or Ferretti 94. The Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 hold 9–11 guests, ideal for smaller festive gatherings.

faq.q: What is the best yacht for a New Year's Eve party in Puerto Banús?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 guests) is a top choice for parties, with a spacious flybridge and included jet ski. For a more intimate celebration, the Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 guests) offers a cosy yet luxurious setting. All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Can we see the New Year's Eve fireworks from the yacht?
faq.a: Yes, Puerto Banús and Marbella Marina host spectacular firework displays on New Year's Eve. Your skipper can anchor at the best vantage points, such as near the Golden Mile or off Cala del Faro, for uninterrupted views of the celebrations.

faq.q: What is the cost of a festive yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. The Mangusta 80 is €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours, including a jet ski. For larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 or Canados 86, pricing is available on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Do you offer catering or special menus for Christmas and New Year?
faq.a: Our standard charter includes light snacks and drinks. For Christmas lunch or a New Year's Eve dinner, we can arrange catering from local Marbella restaurants – just let us know your preferences when booking via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is the weather like for a December yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Marbella enjoys mild winters, with December temperatures averaging 12–18°C. Sunny days are common, but sea conditions can vary. Your skipper will monitor forecasts and ensure a safe, comfortable cruise along the Costa del Sol.

data.body_html:
Celebrate the festive season in style with a Marbella yacht charter for Christmas and New Year. From a serene Christmas Day cruise along the Costa del Sol to a glamorous New Year's Eve party in Puerto Banús, our fleet offers the perfect setting for unforgettable celebrations. With prices starting at €749 for 2 hours, you can enjoy luxury, champagne, and stunning sea views with family and friends.

Why Choose a Festive Yacht Charter in Marbella?

Marbella's mild winter climate makes it an ideal destination for a Christmas or New Year yacht charter. With average December temperatures of 12–18°C and over 300 sunny days a year, you can soak up the sun on deck while sipping cava. Puerto Banús, with its glamorous marina and nearby landmarks like La Concha mountain and the Golden Mile, provides a spectacular backdrop for festive cruises. Whether you're watching fireworks from the water or enjoying a quiet family lunch, a boat rental in Marbella adds a touch of magic to the season.

Our Festive Fleet: Yachts for Every Celebration

We offer a range of yachts to suit different group sizes and budgets. All depart from Puerto Banús and include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and VAT. Here are the top choices for your festive cruise:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – €749/2h, €2,299/8h. Perfect for intimate Christmas lunches or New Year's Eve aperitifs.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – Same pricing as Astondoa 40. Ideal for small groups wanting a stylish party.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – From €4,719 for 4 hours, includes a jet ski. The ultimate New Year's Eve party yacht.
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) – Spacious flybridge for panoramic views of the fireworks.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – Luxury at its finest; pricing on request via WhatsApp.

For smaller groups, the Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) or Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax) offer affordable festive outings. Contact us for full availability and pricing.

Christmas Day Cruise: A Peaceful Celebration on the Water

Spend Christmas Day cruising the Costa del Sol in comfort. Depart from Puerto Banús and head towards Cabopino or Estepona, enjoying the tranquil winter seascape. Your skipper will navigate to sheltered coves like Cala Cortés or Cala del Faro for a peaceful anchorage. On board, you'll have complimentary cava, white wine, and soft drinks to toast the day. For a festive lunch, we can arrange catering from local Marbella restaurants – just let us know when you book your Marbella boat rental.

New Year's Eve Yacht Party: Fireworks and Glamour in Puerto Banús

Ring in the new year with a glamorous yacht party in Puerto Banús. Our larger yachts, like the Mangusta 80 or Azimut 58 Flybridge, are perfect for groups of up to 12 guests. Enjoy the marina's electric atmosphere, then watch the midnight fireworks from the best seat in the house – the water. The skipper can anchor near the Golden Mile or off the coast of Marbella Marina for uninterrupted views. Bring your own champagne or opt for a premium drinks package. Book early, as New Year's Eve slots fill quickly.

New Year's Day Recovery Cruise: Gentle Start to 2025

After the festivities, ease into the new year with a gentle cruise on New Year's Day. Many guests choose a 2-hour charter on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 to soak up the winter sun and enjoy a light brunch on deck. The calm January seas are perfect for a relaxed sail along the coast, past the luxurious villas of the Golden Mile and the iconic La Concha mountain. It's a refreshing way to start the year with loved ones.

What's Included in Your Festive Charter

Every Marbella yacht charter for Christmas and New Year includes:

  • Licensed skipper and crew
  • Fuel and all operating costs
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks (e.g., olives, crisps, nuts)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21% VAT)

For larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 or Canados 86, pricing is customised to your needs – contact us via WhatsApp for a quote.

How to Book Your Festive Yacht Charter

Booking is simple. Browse our fleet on the Marbella boat rental homepage and select your preferred yacht. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), you can book online or via WhatsApp. For all other yachts, including the Mangusta 80, send us a message with your preferred date, time, and guest count. We recommend booking at least two weeks in advance for Christmas and New Year to secure availability. Payment can be made by bank transfer or card.

Explore the Costa del Sol in Winter

A winter yacht charter isn't just about the boat – it's about the destinations. From Puerto Banús, you can cruise to Estepona's charming old town, the sand dunes of Cabopino, or the exclusive Sotogrande marina. The winter light casts a golden glow over the sea and mountains, making for stunning photos. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary to your preferences, whether you want a short harbour tour or a longer coastal exploration.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I charter a yacht on Christmas Day or New Year's Eve in Marbella?

Yes, our fleet is available for charter on Christmas Day, New Year's Eve, and New Year's Day. We recommend booking at least 2 weeks in advance to secure your preferred yacht and time slot, as festive dates are popular.

What is included in a festive yacht charter in Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). For New Year's Eve, you can bring your own champagne or request a premium package via WhatsApp.

How many guests can join a Christmas or New Year cruise?

Our yachts accommodate from 5 guests on the Dubhe (8m) up to 12 guests on the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, or Ferretti 94. The Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 hold 9–11 guests, ideal for smaller festive gatherings.

What is the best yacht for a New Year's Eve party in Puerto Banús?

The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 guests) is a top choice for parties, with a spacious flybridge and included jet ski. For a more intimate celebration, the Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 guests) offers a cosy yet luxurious setting. All depart from Puerto Banús.

Can we see the New Year's Eve fireworks from the yacht?

Yes, Puerto Banús and Marbella Marina host spectacular firework displays on New Year's Eve. Your skipper can anchor at the best vantage points, such as near the Golden Mile or off Cala del Faro, for uninterrupted views of the celebrations.

What is the cost of a festive yacht charter in Marbella?

Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. The Mangusta 80 is €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours, including a jet ski. For larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 or Canados 86, pricing is available on request via WhatsApp.

Do you offer catering or special menus for Christmas and New Year?

Our standard charter includes light snacks and drinks. For Christmas lunch or a New Year's Eve dinner, we can arrange catering from local Marbella restaurants – just let us know your preferences when booking via WhatsApp.

What is the weather like for a December yacht charter in Marbella?

Marbella enjoys mild winters, with December temperatures averaging 12–18°C. Sunny days are common, but sea conditions can vary. Your skipper will monitor forecasts and ensure a safe, comfortable cruise along the Costa del Sol.
